item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.1.0

  • 🎨 Background tool — gradient or solid color behind screenshots with padding, rounded corners, and shadow
  • 🪟 Window capture — capture a specific window with configurable shortcut
  • 📤 Share button — share from the editor via AirDrop, Messages, Mail, etc.
  • 📋 Capture history — floating panel with thumbnail grid, hover actions, drag & drop
  • 🔢 Numbered annotations — click to place numbered circles (1, 2, 3...)
  • 💾 ⌘S save-as dialog — choose where to save from the editor
  • ✨ Toolbar hover effects on all buttons
